note: SWFL place-name -> primary USPS ZIP crosswalk for deterministic, citable place resolution (Lee + Collier counties only). Geographic ZIP/ZCTA boundaries follow the U.S. Census 2024 TIGER/Line ZCTA vintage; each place-name -> ZIP association and USPS preferred mail city was verified against the USPS ZIP Code Lookup (tools.usps.com). A place may span several ZIPs; `zip` is the primary (core/most-recognized) code and `alt_zips` lists the others. This is a SOURCED crosswalk: every entry carries a `source`. Do not invent ZIPs not present here.
default_source: USPS ZIP Code Lookup (tools.usps.com); ZCTA geometry: U.S. Census TIGER/Line 2024 ZCTA Gazetteer
verification_method: USPS ZIP Code Lookup (tools.usps.com) cross-referenced with USPS-derived ZIP directories; ZCTA boundaries per Census 2024 TIGER/Line. No LLM knowledge used as the source of record.

entries.note: Gateway CDP, Lee County. ZCTA 33913 also covers western Lehigh Acres / Miromar Lakes; USPS preferred mail city for 33913 is Fort Myers.
Lehigh Acres CDP spans multiple ZIPs; 33936 is the primary/original code. 33971 and 33972 cover the western/southern sections.
City of Fort Myers spans many ZIPs; 33901 is the central/downtown core and the primary reference.
Cape Coral spans several ZIPs; 33904 (SE Cape, oldest section, Cape Coral South P.O.) is the primary reference.
City of Naples, Collier County. 34102 is the downtown/Old Naples core (5th Ave S, Gulf Shore Blvd S) and the primary reference.
Village of Estero, Lee County. 33928 is the primary Estero code.
Bonita Springs, Lee County (Cape Coral-Fort Myers MSA). 34135 is the primary inland code; 34134 covers the coastal/Bonita Beach side.
Town of Fort Myers Beach (Estero Island), Lee County. 33931 is the dedicated code.
City of Sanibel (Sanibel Island), Lee County. 33957 is the dedicated code.
City of Marco Island, Collier County. 34145 is the dedicated code.
Immokalee CDP, Collier County. 34142 is the dedicated code.
